codeReview.summary: Rerun addresses both prior blockers. Candidate scoping now restricts reconciliation inputs to terminal leaf outcomes only (`dependents.isEmpty`), which excludes prerequisite/internal nodes even after full DAG completion. Winner reason attribution now computes success/evidence/risk/cost/latency/sequence deltas strictly from winner vs runner-up metrics, removing the prior ANY-failed-candidate shortcut.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The runtime-orchestration skill still requires three focused daemon commands (RunService, MissionControlService, ProviderRouter) with explicit per-command evidence, but this rerun handoff sets `followedProcedure: true` without running the focused RunService/ProviderRouter commands directly.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/runtime-orchestration-worker/SKILL.md (Work Procedure step 5) vs /Users/albertonunez/.factory/missions/d1d1287f-f2a9-4a34-8ba9-fce37df13493/handoffs/2026-04-21T00-09-16-681Z__m12-reconciler-candidate-scope-and-terminal-sequence-fix__a9944963-2bde-48bd-81f5-fb18df708dae.json (`verification.commandsRun` includes VAL_EXEC_010, VAL_CROSS_006, BurnBarMissionControlServiceTests, full daemon/core only).

summary: Pass. The rerun commit genuinely resolves the prior scrutiny failures: prerequisite/internal nodes are no longer eligible winner candidates, and persisted winner reason attribution now uses strict winner-vs-runner-up deltas.
